_comment: Override slots for SEARCH_SPACE in my_flow.py (EPC LightGBM regressor). Each top-level key matches a SEARCH_SPACE entry name. 'range' overrides the [LO, HI] search range (or the universe list for a categorical slot); 'init' overrides the warm-start value enqueued as the study's first trial. Keys absent from SEARCH_SPACE are reported and ignored. A slot that omits 'range' or 'init' keeps the SEARCH_SPACE default for that field. Scalar top-level keys (e.g. n_trials, cv_folds, val_fraction, test_fraction, sample_rows, target_zone, random_state, storage, mlflow_uri, study_name, lgbm_fixed) override the run-level defaults baked into my_flow.py RUN_DEFAULTS; '_'-prefixed keys and '__version__' are documentation only.
_comment_warmstart: init values are a deterministic warm-start anchor: train enqueues them as the study's first trial (trial 0) so it reproduces a known-good config, then TPE micro-explores around it across the remaining n_trials. The range slots are unchanged by init, so TPE still scans the full envelope; only the warm-start anchor moves. Drop an 'init' to let TPE cold-start that param; drop the whole slot to keep the SEARCH_SPACE default range.
